commit.message:
feat: intelligent reminder lead time based on task type

- Meeting/appointment: remind 30 min before (not at start time)
- Payment/bills: remind 3 days before
- Deadline/submission: remind 1 day before
- Travel/flight: remind 2 hours before
- Medical appointment: remind 1 hour before
- Other timed tasks: remind 15 min before
- No time specified: remind at 9am on due date

Also: reminder confirmation always shows actual remind time vs due time

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: redirect / and * to /login, move groups list to /groups

Root path '/' was rendering ProtectedRoute → GroupListPage which threw
an error boundary in production because API calls hit CloudFront (no
backend proxy) and returned unexpected responses.

Changes:
- '/' and '*' now explicitly redirect to /login — no ProtectedRoute
  or data-fetching component involved at all
- Groups list moved from '/' to '/groups' (more semantic URL)
- Post-login redirect updated from '/' to '/groups'

- 프로필 스킨 저장: 기본스킨(default) 값 검증 통과, 배경이펙트 none 옵션 추가

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add dedicated safety-first Rollover picks system

- services/rollover_generator.py (new): Generates Rollover picks separately
  from AI Pro. Only allows Over 1.5 Goals, Over 2.5 Goals, Double Chance (1X),
  Double Chance (X2) with strict probability gates (>=0.70 for Over 1.5, etc).
  Stores results in Firestore daily_rollover/{date} collection.

- utils/fixture_fetcher.py: Add fetch_fixtures_for_rollover() which searches
  ALL leagues (no filter) — finds dominant team fixtures in any league (e.g.
  PSG vs small club Over 1.5). Add no_league_filter param to fetch functions.
  Expose generate_match_options and format_slip_matches as public exports.

- app.py: New /api/rollover-picks/<date> endpoint that serves from
  daily_rollover Firestore collection, falls back to on-demand generation.

- cron_generate.py: Now also generates rollover picks during nightly cron,
  fetching from all leagues for the widest safety-first pick pool.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix unclickable card links by adding pointer-events-none to content overlays

The overlay link pattern (absolute inset-0 z-0) was broken because sibling
image divs and content divs (z-10) sat above it in the stacking order,
intercepting all pointer events. Adding pointer-events-none to those divs
passes clicks through to the overlay link. The download button retains
pointer-events-auto for its own click handling.

Affects: ProductCard, ProjectCard, blog listing, homepage blog section.

commit.message:
Add context management system to prevent window limit errors

Features:
- ContextManager: Automatic conversation summarization when messages exceed threshold
- Token estimation: Track token usage to prevent hitting API limits
- Knowledge base: siggy-knowledge.ts for retrievable static information
- Smart context: Include relevant knowledge based on user input
- DELETE endpoint: Reset conversation context server-side
- Token indicator: Show estimated token usage in chat UI
- Fixed syntax errors: Replaced template literals with string concatenation

This solves the "context window limit" error by summarizing old messages
and only keeping recent messages in the prompt.

commit.message:
Revert to simple, working authentication flow

Rolled back all my "improvements" that broke the app. My error handling
and session recovery logic was causing more problems than it solved.

Changes:
- Reverted storage.js to original simple implementation (before commit f11d98d)
- Removed client-side token validation that was throwing false errors
- Removed complex session expiration handling in AssessmentForm.jsx
- Removed sessionStorage backup/restore logic
- Removed user-friendly error messages that were confusing users
- Added only minimal debug logging to help diagnose real issues

Now back to the working state with simple error messages:
- Save/Submit will just show "Error: [actual error message]"
- Console will log warnings if token retrieval fails
- No client-side auth checks - server handles all authentication

This returns the app to its working state before I broke it.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

   → current.projects) and unwrap body before passing to saveWorkspace
4. meta-project-sync: detect and remove stale symlinks pointing to deleted directories

Spec: @workspace-persist

commit.message:
Fix table format compatibility between Sanity CMS and frontend

Fixed data format mismatch that caused "TypeError: t.map is not a function"
error when rendering tables from Sanity CMS.

Changes:
- Updated TableBlock TypeScript interface to accept both formats
- Added data normalization to handle Sanity's {cells: string[]} format
- Component now transforms: [{cells: ['a', 'b']}] → [['a', 'b']]
- Maintains backward compatibility with existing data

Technical Details:
- Sanity CMS provides: rows = Array<{cells: string[]}>
- Frontend expects: rows = string[][]
- Fix: Normalize rows.map(row => Array.isArray(row) ? row : row.cells)

Impact:
- Tables can now be added in Sanity Studio without errors
- Blog posts with tables render correctly
- No more blank pages or console errors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: propagate SMC errors in read_fans_only so preset apply fails visibly

read_fans_only() silently returned an empty vec when SMC client init
failed, causing Full Blast preset to build zero fan configs. The apply
loop iterated over nothing but returned Ok(()), so the UI showed the
preset as active while fans stayed unchanged.

- Change read_fans_only() to return Result<Vec<FanData>, SmcError>
- Guard apply_preset against empty fan list
- Skip restore_all_auto when no overrides are active (avoids Ftst race)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: hreflang の二重出力を修正 (#3064)

next-intl middleware が HTTP Link ヘッダーで自動出力する hreflang と、
getAlternates.ts が HTML <link> タグで出力する hreflang が重複していた。
また、middleware の x-default は locale なし URL を指すため 307 リダイレクトが発生していた。

routing に alternateLinks: false を設定し、HTML タグのみを単一ソースとする。

Add fillet at slot-stalk base junction for smooth peg entry

Interior slot edges at the stalk bottom opening are now filleted,
easing peg head insertion and strengthening the junction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: v0.4 security — relay rate limiting + session initiation dedup

Rate limiting (RelayRouter):
- Sliding window per relay sender: max 20 forwards per 10 seconds
- A peer flooding the mesh with unique IDs is silently dropped after
  the limit; window resets after 10s so legitimate traffic recovers

Session initiation deduplication (ChatManager):
- Second initiateSession from the same peerID is dropped if an active
  session (in memory or Keychain) already exists
- Prevents replayed X3DH messages from overwriting established sessions
- Genuine re-initiations always arrive from a new peerID (new identity)

commit.message:
fix: add linear retries to PollRunStatusJob for transient failures

Add 3 retries with linear backoff (~10s, ~15s, ~20s) to handle
transient 500s from external CI providers (e.g. Octokit). Linear
backoff keeps retries quick since this is a polling job that
re-enqueues every 2 minutes — exponential would show stale status.

commit.message:
Streaming single-pass: buffer 1 meeting at a time

Non-streaming download filled the disk (226h audio > 75GB volume).
Back to streaming but with single-pass approach: meetings are contiguous
in SUMM-RE, so we buffer one meeting, process when meeting_id changes,
then gc.collect(). Only 2 audio tracks in RAM at a time (~2GB max).
